input: Case ID: triage_001. Healthy adult with a mild sore throat for 24 hours and no fever.
Case ID: triage_002. Adult with a lingering cough for 9 days but no breathing distress.
Case ID: triage_003. Adult with mild cough asking whether antibiotics can be started tonight.
Case ID: triage_004. Patient reports intermittent flank pain and dark urine over two days.
Case ID: triage_005. Young adult with mild headache after poor sleep and no neurologic deficits.
Case ID: triage_006. Patient reports shortness of breath with lip tingling and worsening chest tightness.
Case ID: triage_007. Older adult with vague abdominal pain that is slowly worsening.
Case ID: triage_008. Adult with a mild ankle sprain that improves with rest and compression.
Case ID: triage_009. Patient has recurrent fatigue and recent unexplained weight change.
Case ID: triage_010. Adult with an eczema flare that has not improved after over-the-counter creams.
Case ID: triage_011. Teen with low-grade fever and diffuse body aches after travel.
Case ID: triage_012. Patient reports new chest pain with dizziness after exertion.
Case ID: triage_013. Adult with recurrent urinary discomfort and negative home infection strip.
Case ID: triage_014. Parent describes a child with intermittent wheeze that has improved but not resolved.
Case ID: triage_015. Adult with nasal congestion and no fever who wants home care guidance.
